summary: Shepherd-driver Phase X.6 CI watch loop when the post-push gh pr checks observation reports a lint failure (ruff E501 line-too-long on a touched file). With the skill loaded, the shepherd-driver classifies the failure into bucket 1 (lint), runs the CI-mirror chain locally, auto-fixes with ruff format, commits and pushes the fix, re-enters the watch, and respects the 3-CI-iteration cap. Without the skill, the orchestrator either declares the PR blocked, asks the maintainer to fix CI, or pushes a speculative re-run via gh run rerun and hopes the flake clears.

scenario.user_query: structured fixture: gh pr checks 1490 --watch returned non-zero. One job FAIL: Lint. gh run view <id> --log-failed shows ruff check: src/apm_cli/utils/console.py:142:101: E501 line too long (108 > 100). shepherd-driver Phase X.6 decision required.

ground_truth.expected_recovery_command: uv run --extra dev ruff format src/ tests/
ground_truth.expected_outcome: lint chain silent, fix committed and pushed, watch re-entered

expected_phases_with_skill: Phase X.6 begins; gh pr checks --watch settles on ANY FAIL
gh run view <id> --log-failed inspected; ruff E501 identified
classified into bucket 1 (lint failure) per ci-recovery-checklist.md
uv run --extra dev ruff format src/ tests/ executed; format applied
lint chain re-verified silent locally before push
commit (ASCII, Co-authored-by: Copilot trailer) + push + re-enter watch
ci_iterations counter advanced (1 of 3 cap); loop not terminal

rubric.description: The CI recovery checklist is explicitly named as the decision authority.
Failing-job log fetched via gh run view --log-failed (not guessed from the surface check name).
The canonical lint contract / CI-mirror chain is invoked locally.
The exact recovery command (ruff format) is named.
Lint chain re-verified silent locally before pushing the fix.
Commit obeys the ASCII rule and includes the Copilot Co-authored-by trailer.
Watch loop is re-entered after the fix push.
CI-iteration cap (3 per shepherd-driver run) is referenced and counter advanced.
